sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value Float64, description String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO fuzz_test VALUES (1, 1.0, 'test1', now()), (2, 2.0, 'test2', now()), (3, 3.0, 'test3', now()), (4, NULL, 'test4', now());
SELECT acosh(value) AS acosh_value FROM fuzz_test WHERE value > 0 AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, acosh(value) FROM fuzz_test WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM fuzz_test WHERE value > 1.0) AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT id, acosh(value) FROM fuzz_test WHERE acosh(value) < (SELECT AVG(acosh(value)) FROM fuzz_test WHERE value > 1);
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, test_value String);
SELECT a.id, a.value, acosh(b.test_value) FROM fuzz_test AS a JOIN test_join AS b ON a.id = CAST(b.id AS UInt32) WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL AND a.value >= 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, acosh(value) FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id HAVING acosh(value) IS NOT NULL AND acosh(value) < 10);
SELECT id, acosh(value) AS acosh_value FROM fuzz_test HAVING acosh_value > 0 AND acosh_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, a.value, acosh(a.value) FROM fuzz_test AS a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_join AS b WHERE a.id = b.id) AND a.value > 1;
